intent: Environment/iteration mechanics around working on the UI, not the UI itself: restart the vite dev server after vite.config proxy changes, tmux panes not inheriting the spawner's PATH (absolutise argv[0]), and send_to_user links being file paths not URLs. Drill in when the dev loop misbehaves rather than the rendered surface.
label: WebUI dev-loop mechanics (vite proxy restart, tmux PATH, send_to_user link form)
